text.title: TTS Implementation — Procedure
text.summary: 8-step procedure for production long-form TTS: probe cache → measure → semantic split → parallel synth → assemble → measure total → log → evict.

step.name: probe-full-cache
step.input: full text, voice, speed, model, provider
step.action: Compute cache_key = sha256 of full payload. If `{cache_dir}/{cache_key}/assembled.mp3` exists, return cached=true with the existing chunks index.
step.decision-gate: cache hit → skip to step 7 with cached=true.

step.name: measure-and-route
step.input: text length, provider, presence of SSML, voice mode (library / clone)
step.action: If len(text) <= 4000 → delegate to tts-basics single-call path. If clone requested → consent gate before any provider call. If SSML present → force provider in {google, azure}.

step.name: semantic-split
step.action: Split on `\n\n` paragraph boundaries; for paragraphs > 3500 chars, split on sentence regex `(?<=[.!?])\s+`; for runaway code blocks, hard-split at 3500-char marks at whitespace. Each chunk <= 3950 chars.

step.name: dispatch-parallel-synth
step.input: chunks list, voice, speed, model, provider, tempdir from mkdtemp()
step.action: For each chunk: compute per-chunk cache_key = sha256(chunk + voice + speed + provider); probe per-chunk cache; on miss, call provider SDK. Dispatch in parallel via asyncio.gather() with concurrency cap = tier RPM / 60 + 1.
step.output: List[dict] with per-chunk {index, path, duration_s, char_count, cached}.

step.name: assemble
step.action: Use pydub.AudioSegment.from_file per chunk; concatenate with `AudioSegment.silent(duration=300)` (300ms gap) between chunks. Export to `{cache_dir}/{cache_key}/assembled.mp3`.

step.name: measure-total
step.action: Compute `total_duration = AudioSegment.from_file(assembled).duration_seconds`. Assert `abs(total_duration - sum(c.duration_s for c in chunks)) < 1.0`. If 0.0, return error.

step.name: log-and-cleanup
step.action: Emit pipeline metrics: provider, voice, total_char_count, total_duration_s, cache_hit_count / len(chunks). `shutil.rmtree(tempdir, ignore_errors=True)`. Persist chunks index JSON next to assembled.mp3 for partial replay.

step.name: evict
step.action: Walk cache_dir, sort entries by mtime, delete entries older than max_age_days, then delete LRU until total size <= max_size_mb. Record files_removed and bytes_freed for the output eviction object.
